name: pdf-fusion-smart-pro
description: Browser-first PDF toolkit with Verify System v11: server-signed registry, short QR, auto-register, audit log, revoke/restore/expiry, admin console, PWA, OCR and PDF utilities.

scripts.check:js: node --check api/verify.js && find assets -name '*.js' -maxdepth 1 -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 node --check
